title: Prime prime power
description: In this problem we are interested only in prime prime powers, i.e., numbers of the form ab, where a and b are prime numbers. For a given number n, we want to find the k-th smallest prime prime power greater than n.
input: The first and only line of the input contains two integers n and k (1 ≤ n ≤ 1018, 1 ≤ k ≤ 100,000).
output: The first and only line of output should contain one integer m, such that m is the k-th smallest prime prime power greater than n.
